name: Adam - Dominant, Firm
description: A bright tenor pitch that immediately cuts through. The delivery is brash and openly confident, speaking with unwavering certainty and a slightly aggressive self-assurance.

name: Alice - Clear, Engaging Educator
description: Clear and engaging, friendly woman with a British accent suitable for e-learning.

name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
description: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

name: Bill - Wise, Mature, Balanced
description: Friendly and comforting voice ready to narrate your stories.

name: Branok - Evil & Villainous
description: An ancient, deep, and menacing male voice with a heavy, gravelly texture. The tone is slow, deliberate, and dripping with malicious intent. It carries a terrifying weight and a sinister, commanding presence. Ideal for video game bosses, dark fantasy audiobooks, sci-fi alien villains, cinematic movie trailers, dramatic narrations, and tabletop RPG creature voices. Voice by Hey Its Cooper.

name: Brian - Deep, Resonant and Comforting
description: Middle-aged man with a resonant and comforting tone. Great for narrations and advertisements.

name: Britney - Calm and Calculative Villain
description: Brittney - Female Villain, Wicked and Deliciously Dark - A calm and calculating female villain. The perfect character for your epic novel, dark animation, or fantasy film. She is mischievous, clever, cunning, and deliciously dark. Though sarcastic at times, she is dangerously smart and outwits her enemies easily. A wicked addition to your script!

name: Callum - Husky Trickster
description: Deceptively gravelly, yet unsettling edge.

name: Cameo - Sophisticated and Smooth
description: Cameo - A smooth, captivating female voice with a rich, slightly deep tone and a confident, intimate delivery. The voice carries a natural warmth and subtle huskiness that draws listeners in. Perfect for storytelling, tech explainers, luxury branding, and emotionally resonant narration. Balances sophistication with approachability—ideal for brands seeking trust, depth, and a touch of allure.

name: Charlie - Deep, Confident, Energetic
description: A young Australian male with a confident and energetic voice.

name: Chris - Charming, Down-to-Earth
description: Natural and real, this down-to-earth voice is great across many use-cases.

name: Cornelius
description: A wise old sage wizard, with tales to spin for you!

name: Daniel - Steady Broadcaster
description: A strong voice perfect for delivering a professional broadcast or news story.

name: Diana
description: Diana speaks with a posh British, confident flow, choosing her words with the kind of clarity that feels natural rather than practiced. There’s a gentle, well-educated lilt in her cadence, softened by youth and curiosity, giving her a blend of quiet intelligence and charm.

name: Edward - Loud, Confident and Cocky
description: Cocky Male Villain Voice - A smug and charismatic male voice oozing with confidence and wicked charm. He’s the kind of villain who loves to hear himself talk—taunting heroes with a devilish grin and a voice that drips with theatrical flair. Perfect for video games, this voice delivers every line like it’s the punchline to a joke only he’s in on. Think "over-the-top, dramatic, anime antagonist" bursting with arrogance and loving every second of it.

name: Ember - Energetic, Confident Protagonist
description: Ember - Energetic Confident Protagonist

name: Eric - Smooth, Trustworthy
description: A smooth tenor pitch from a man in his 40s - perfect for agentic use cases.

name: Fena - Girly, Young and Sassy Hero
description: Fena - Character - Young, sassy girl character.

name: Freya - Valley Girl
description: Like, um, she's totally your quintessential valley girl! Like, O. M. G. totally!

name: George - Warm, Captivating Storyteller
description: Warm resonance that instantly captivates listeners.

name: Gideon - Rugged, Gravelly & Northern
description: A dramatic Northern character voice with grit, restraint, and quiet authority. Built for fantasy, games, audiobooks, historical drama, and battle-worn storytelling.

name: Harry - Fierce Warrior
description: An animated warrior ready to charge forward.

name: Jen Frankie - Entitled & Spoiled
description: Reality TV wife. Gossip and drama. Small town glamorous. She'd be a real sweetheart if she wasn't so demanding and annoyed. A funny American female character voice by Miss Frankie. Western United States, Utah accent.

name: Jessica - Playful, Bright, Warm
description: Young and popular, this playful American female voice is perfect for trendy content.

name: Jessica Anne Bogart - Eloquent Villain
description: Jessica Anne Bogart - Character and Animation - The Villain! Wickedly eloquent. Calculating. Cruel and calm.

name: Laura - Enthusiast, Quirky Attitude
description: This young adult female voice delivers sunny enthusiasm with a quirky attitude.

name: Liam - Energetic, Social Media Creator
description: A young adult with energy and warmth - suitable for reels and shorts.

name: Lily - Velvety Actress
description: Velvety British female voice delivers news and narrations with warmth and clarity.

name: Matilda - Knowledgable, Professional
description: A professional woman with a pleasing alto pitch. Suitable for many use cases.

name: Mrs. Claus — Head of Christmas Operations
description: Warm, wise, and impeccably organized. Maternal heart + executive brain. Reassuring, capable, gently humorous.

name: Oxley - Evil, Mature and Ominous
description: Oxley - Evil Character - Matured American male character presaging ominous events for animation and other engaging media.

name: River - Relaxed, Neutral, Informative
description: A relaxed, neutral voice ready for narrations or conversational projects.

name: Roger - Laid-Back, Casual, Resonant
description: Easy going and perfect for casual conversations.

name: Sarah - Mature, Reassuring, Confident
description: Young adult woman with a confident and warm, mature quality and a reassuring, professional tone.

name: Serafina - Sensual Temptress
description: Serafina - Flirty Sensual Temptress - A deep, smooth American woman's voice that is rich, velvety, and irresistibly captivating, the delivery effortlessly blends warmth with a subtle edge of mystery. From breathy whispers that evoke intimacy to smooth, flowing tones that exude confidence, this voice captures the essence of seduction and charm. Perfect for a villain, seductress, succubus, siren, mommy, or femme fatale. Use for any entertainment content such as video games, animation, audiobook narrations, or audio dramas.

name: Toby - Little Mythical Monster
description: Creature - Goblin Mythical Monster - A goblin creature with a high-pitched voice. Great for animation, video games, and characters.

name: Victor - Deep, Malevolent and Ancient
description: Kallixis - Monster & Deep  - A deep ancient malevolence voice. Great for character & Animations.

name: Will - Relaxed Optimist
description: Conversational and laid back.
